items.title: Commit SKILL.md and references/ to hook-audit skill repo
items.description: SKILL.md (230 lines) and references/flow.dot.template are untracked. Should be committed to prevent accidental loss.

items.title: Add BATS test using multi-event fixture for coverage phase
items.description: multi-event.json exists but unused. coverage_marks_covered_event only checks for any checkmark; could assert specific event names.

items.title: Audit all skills for jq CRLF issue on Windows
items.description: CRLF-from-jq bug affects any skill that pipes jq into IFS-based bash read on Windows. Audit skills/*/scripts/*.sh for missing tr -d .
